options.content:
### status-page-availability

The public status page remains externally reachable as the last-resort platform signal.

Service: `status_page`

[Open Grafana](https://grafana.lv3.org/d/lv3-slo-overview/lv3-slo-overview?var-slo=status-page-availability)

### grafana-availability

Grafana remains reachable through the public LV3 edge.

Service: `grafana`

[Open Grafana](https://grafana.lv3.org/d/lv3-slo-overview/lv3-slo-overview?var-slo=grafana-availability)

### gitea-availability

The private Gitea runtime remains reachable for repository hosting, webhooks, and self-hosted CI orchestration.

Service: `gitea`

[Open Grafana](https://grafana.lv3.org/d/lv3-slo-overview/lv3-slo-overview?var-slo=gitea-availability)

### keycloak-availability

Keycloak discovery remains reachable for operator and service authentication.

Service: `keycloak`

[Open Grafana](https://grafana.lv3.org/d/lv3-slo-overview/lv3-slo-overview?var-slo=keycloak-availability)

### keycloak-latency

Keycloak discovery responds in under 500ms for 95% of probes.

Service: `keycloak`

Latency threshold: `500ms`

[Open Grafana](https://grafana.lv3.org/d/lv3-slo-overview/lv3-slo-overview?var-slo=keycloak-latency)

### uptime-kuma-availability

Uptime Kuma remains reachable through the public status surface.

Service: `uptime_kuma`

[Open Grafana](https://grafana.lv3.org/d/lv3-slo-overview/lv3-slo-overview?var-slo=uptime-kuma-availability)

### nginx-edge-availability

The edge reverse proxy remains reachable for published services.

Service: `nginx_edge`

[Open Grafana](https://grafana.lv3.org/d/lv3-slo-overview/lv3-slo-overview?var-slo=nginx-edge-availability)

### open-webui-availability

Open WebUI remains reachable on the private runtime network.

Service: `open_webui`

[Open Grafana](https://grafana.lv3.org/d/lv3-slo-overview/lv3-slo-overview?var-slo=open-webui-availability)

### windmill-availability

Windmill API stays reachable for scheduled automation.

Service: `windmill`

[Open Grafana](https://grafana.lv3.org/d/lv3-slo-overview/lv3-slo-overview?var-slo=windmill-availability)

### netbox-availability

NetBox remains reachable for inventory, IPAM, and topology workflows.

Service: `netbox`

[Open Grafana](https://grafana.lv3.org/d/lv3-slo-overview/lv3-slo-overview?var-slo=netbox-availability)

### platform-context-api-availability

The platform context API remains reachable for agent-assisted operator workflows.

Service: `platform_context_api`

[Open Grafana](https://grafana.lv3.org/d/lv3-slo-overview/lv3-slo-overview?var-slo=platform-context-api-availability)
